creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
vuxml shown below, note that wireshark port is already up to 1.0.6 so this just documents the vulnerability - no need maintainer-update. Fix: wireshark -- Wireshark 1.0.5 Multiple Denial of Service Vulnerabilities wireshark 1.0.5 0.99.6

Vendor reports:

On non-Windows systems Wireshark could crash if the HOME environment variable contained sprintf-style string formatting characters. Wireshark could crash while reading a malformed NetScreen snoop file. Wireshark could crash while reading a Tektronix K12 text capture file.

http://www.wireshark.org/security/wnpa-sec-2009-01.html 2009-02-06 2009-02-14
